requirements.task_name: Start enrollment for the cheapest full-time toddler program within 5 miles of ZIP 94105 under $1,500/month
requirements.task_description: Find toddler programs, filter to full-time options within 5 miles of ZIP 94105 costing no more than $1,500/month, sort by price, and begin the enrollment process for the cheapest matching program.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever searchPrograms is invoked (on any call), overwrite this key with the filter and sort arguments used for that call.
required_variables.value_to_set: { ageGroupCode, campusId, postalCode, distanceMiles, scheduleTypes, maxMonthlyTuition, sortBy, timestamp: this._nowISO() }
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to verify that the user ran a program search using the correct criteria for Task 1 (toddler age group, postal code 94105, distance 5 miles, full-time schedule type, max tuition 1500, and sort by price_low_high) before starting enrollment. The actual selected program is already captured in enrollment_applications via program_id.

requirements.task_name: Schedule a weekday morning tour at the Downtown Campus between June 10–20
requirements.task_description: Book an in-person tour at the Downtown Campus on a weekday morning between June 10 and June 20, for one child aged 3, by completing and submitting the tour request form.

requirements.task_name: Join the waitlist for the cheaper of half-day and full-day preschool programs for a 4-year-old at Lakeside Campus
requirements.task_description: Compare one half-day and one full-day preschool program for 4-year-olds at the Lakeside Campus, identify which has the lower annual tuition, and join the waitlist for that cheaper program.

requirements.task_name: Use the tuition calculator to create a 3-day extended schedule for an infant under a $1,000 monthly budget and save the quote
requirements.task_description: Use the tuition calculator to configure an infant schedule on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM, set a maximum monthly budget of $1,000, calculate the tuition, and save the resulting quote.

requirements.task_name: Find a highly rated toddler teacher with 5+ years of experience and add them to favorites
requirements.task_description: Filter staff profiles to show toddler teachers with at least 5 years of experience and ratings of 4.5 stars or higher, then open the top-rated profile and add that teacher to the favorites list.

requirements.task_name: RSVP to the first two free weekend family events next month in the afternoon and register 3 attendees for each
requirements.task_description: Use the events calendar to go to next month, filter for free family events on Saturday and Sunday afternoons, and submit RSVPs for the first two events in the filtered list with 3 attendees each.

requirements.task_name: Search FAQs about potty training and send a contact form with a related question
requirements.task_description: Search the FAQ section for potty training information, open a relevant article, then use the linked contact form to send a message with the subject 'Curriculum & Potty Training' asking when potty training support begins.

required_variables.set_condition: When searchArticles is called with isFaq === true and a non-empty query (FAQ search), overwrite this key with the parameters used for that call.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that the user ran an FAQ search with the correct query text ('potty training') rather than reaching the article by another path. The associated contact message and article_id already allow checking that the opened article is about potty training and that the submitted subject/message are correct.

requirements.task_name: Sign up for the email newsletter with specific topics and center preferences
requirements.task_description: Use the newsletter signup form in the site footer to subscribe with a specific name, email, ZIP code, two selected topics, a preferred center, and two child age ranges.
